briefs.title: BC Provincial Nominee Program fee rises from $1,475 to $1,750 effective January 22, 2026
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 4/2026 amends the Provincial Immigration Programs Regulation to increase the application fee under section 3(a)(iii) from $1,475 to $1,750, effective January 22, 2026.
briefs.action_required: Update any internal fee schedules or employee immigration support budgets to reflect the new $1,750 application fee.

key_dates.label: BC Provincial Immigration Programs fee increase to $1,750 takes effect
